G: fix(auth_mw_expiry_skew30_boundary_refresh_loop)

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(auth_mw_expiry_skew30_boundary_refresh_loop).

Hypothesis: boundary and uses and strict and < and nowMs and causing and refresh_loop and at and 30-second grace window and edge.
Plan: accept and if and expMs>=nowMs-30000 then keep 401 behavior and else.
Verify: edge(-30s_200).
Answer target: regression test.

C: age>=ttl ∧ ttl_exact_boundary ∧ revalidate_on_stale

Goal: fix(boundary_freshness_loop).

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(null_session_ping_401)

C: auth_guard ∧ public_ping ∧ !session
H: public_ping ∧ bypasses ∧ auth ∧ when ∧ session ∧ is ∧ null
P: !session → 200(ping) ∧ !session → 401(other_auth)
V: healthcheck_persists ∧ ping_public ∧ auth_guard
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(null_session_ping_401).
Constraints: auth_guard and public_ping and high-risk session.

Plan: high-risk session then 200(ping) and high-risk session then 401(other_auth).
Verify: healthcheck_persists and ping_public and auth_guard.
Answer target: regression test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
